footer.blurb: An Emirati boutique brokerage built around the highest-value real estate decisions in the UAE.

hero.title: Find what moves the markets that matter.
hero.subtitle: Trusted brokerage for high-value real estate across the UAE.

title: Major real estate
doesn't move
by accident.
paragraphs: Vamar is an Emirati real estate brokerage built for assets above AED 50 million — towers, investment lands, luxury villas, and major projects across the UAE.
We don't run high-volume listings. We run a small number of significant deals — quietly, professionally, and with absolute discretion.

title: Heavy assets,
handled with care.
chevronStrip.subtitle: The category changes. The discipline doesn't: privacy, precision, and direct access to the right side of every deal.

panels.alt: Commercial tower glass facade at dusk
Investment land plot near Dubai skyline
Luxury villa exterior at golden hour
Major real estate development under construction

title: Properties above
AED 50 million.
heavyAssets.intro: We specialise in managing and marketing heavy real estate — properties exceeding AED 50 million — with a focus on premium assets that hold long-term investment value.
heavyAssets.note: We operate with privacy and professionalism, dealing directly with property owners or those holding official power of attorney — ensuring opportunity credibility and deal quality.

title: Major deals,
managed quietly.
rewiredSteps.lead: Heavy real estate doesn't need theatre. It needs a partner who understands the asset, protects the principals, and moves only when the alignment is real.

steps.title: We understand the asset and the intent.
steps.body: Whether you own a tower or you're searching for one, we start with the brief — the asset, the timing, the constraints, and what success looks like for you specifically.

steps.title: We move through our network, not the noise.
steps.body: Our work happens privately. We connect serious owners with serious buyers — pre-qualified, capitalised, and prepared to move at the level the deal requires.

steps.title: We manage the transaction end to end.
steps.body: Negotiation, due diligence, paperwork, regulatory steps — managed discreetly by one accountable team, from first conversation to final signature.

title: A small team
that closes more
than it speaks.
founders.subtitle: Vamar is led by two Emirati partners with deep relationships across the UAE's high-value real estate market.

members.name: Abdullah Al Naqbi
members.quote: At Vamar, we believe trust comes before closing any deal. We build genuine, sustainable relationships with owners and investors — and we present exceptional opportunities with a style that fits the value of the assets we represent.
members.bio: Abdullah leads owner relationships and the Heavy Assets Division. His view: a 50-million-dirham conversation begins with credibility, not with a portfolio. He works directly with property owners and their authorised representatives across Dubai and the wider UAE.

members.name: Salem bin Touq
members.quote: Heavy real estate needs experience, privacy, and deep market understanding. At Vamar, we focus on reaching the right investor and building deals based on credibility, professionalism, and strong relationships.
members.bio: Salem leads the investor side — local and international principals looking for serious, off-market opportunities. His work is to qualify intent before introducing a deal, so every meeting starts with both sides already aligned.

title: Represent your asset
the way it deserves.
ownersPitch.body: If you own a tower, a major land plot, a luxury villa, or a premium asset, Vamar gives you a private, professional channel to qualified buyers — without exposure on public listings.

talkToHuman.eyebrowSmall: No bots. No public listings of private assets.
title: Speak with a
real partner.
talkToHuman.body: A founder or a senior member of the team responds personally. We listen first, share nothing without permission, and tell you straight when an opportunity isn't the right fit.

title: Why Vamar,
in detail.
whyAccordion.subtitle: The questions worth asking before you engage anyone with an asset of this size.

items.a: We work with property owners (and their official representatives) of assets above AED 50 million, and with serious investors — both local and international — looking for confidential access to premium UAE real estate.
No. Heavy assets we represent are not posted on public portals. We work off-market by default, sharing details only with qualified, intent-aligned counterparties.
Information about the asset, the owner, and the buyer is shared only with parties who have signed appropriate confidentiality terms and have demonstrated readiness to transact at the relevant level.

items.q: Do you handle properties below AED 50M?
items.a: Our focus is the heavy-asset segment. We may make exceptions for long-standing relationships or for premium assets that fit our network, but we are not a high-volume general brokerage.
Yes. Vamar is an Emirati-founded and Emirati-led brokerage, registered in the UAE, with deep local relationships across owners, family offices, and major investors.

items.q: How quickly can a deal move?
items.a: When both sides are ready, very quickly. The majority of the timeline goes into qualifying alignment — once that's done, the transaction itself is short and disciplined.

title: Privacy is the
foundation of every
major deal.
paragraphs: At Vamar, privacy isn't a policy — it's the core of how we operate. We apply the highest standards of confidentiality and professionalism across every conversation, document, and introduction.
We protect the information of owners and investors. We handle sensitive opportunities with a professional approach that preserves discretion at every stage.
We deal selectively — only with serious, qualified parties — creating a safe and trusted environment for high-value transactions.

pillars.title: Direct and selective contact
pillars.body: Only serious, qualified parties enter the conversation.

pillars.title: Professional handling of sensitive opportunities
pillars.body: The asset, the owner, and the buyer remain protected at every step.

pillars.title: Full information protection
pillars.body: Owner and investor information is safeguarded across the entire deal lifecycle.

privacy.badge: A trusted environment for the UAE's largest real estate transactions.

title: Speak to Vamar.
contact.subtitle: Specialist Emirati brokerage for heavy assets and high-value real estate across the UAE.

about.metaDescription: An Emirati boutique brokerage for high-value real estate in the UAE.
title: A different kind of
Emirati brokerage,
built for serious assets.
about.intro: Vamar Real Estate is an Emirati brokerage specialising in heavy real estate — assets above AED 50 million — across the United Arab Emirates. We focus on towers, investment lands, luxury villas, and major real estate projects, with a professional model built on trust, privacy, and direct relationships.
storyParagraphs: Major real estate doesn't work like the rest of the market. The owners are different. The buyers are different. The information, the timelines, and the stakes are different. The brokerage representing the asset has to be different too.
Vamar was founded to provide that level of representation — quietly, with the relationships and discretion that high-value deals require.

principles.title: Trust comes before any deal.
principles.body: We build relationships first. The transaction follows when the alignment is real — never the other way around.

principles.title: Privacy is non-negotiable.
principles.body: Owner identity, asset details, and buyer intent are all protected. We don't post heavy assets on public portals.

principles.title: Direct contact only.
principles.body: We deal with property owners or those holding official power of attorney — and with serious, qualified buyers. No middle layers, no noise.

principles.title: Deep UAE specialisation.
principles.body: Emirati-founded, Emirati-led, with relationships across the country's most significant owners, family offices, and investors.

team.metaDescription: Meet the founders and team behind Vamar Real Estate.
title: Specialists,
not generalists.
team.intro: Vamar is led personally by its two founders. Every introduction, every negotiation, and every confidentiality decision goes through one of them — by design.
team.more: More partners and senior team members to be announced.

paperwork.metaDescription: The documentation involved in major UAE real estate transactions — clear, sequenced, and explained.
title: Every signature,
in its right place.
paperwork.intro: Major real estate transactions in the UAE involve several layers of documentation — between owners, buyers, brokers, banks, and the Dubai Land Department (or the relevant emirate's authority). Below is what to expect, sequenced from first conversation to title transfer.
paperwork.imageAlt: A clean desk with documents and a fountain pen

docs.label: Title Deed (Oqood / Mulkiya)
docs.note: Proof of ownership issued by the relevant land department.

docs.label: Power of Attorney (if applicable)
docs.note: Notarised authorisation for a representative to act on the owner's behalf.

docs.label: Listing Authorisation Agreement
docs.note: The terms under which Vamar may represent and market the asset.

docs.label: Service Charges & NOC
docs.note: No Objection Certificate from the developer or community, plus settled service charges.

docs.label: Proof of Funds / Bank Letter
docs.note: Required before formal introductions for heavy assets.

docs.label: Memorandum of Understanding (Form F)
docs.note: The standard sale & purchase agreement between buyer and seller.

docs.label: Mortgage Pre-Approval (if financed)
docs.note: From a UAE bank, valid at the time of MOU signing.

docs.label: Form A — Listing Agreement
docs.note: Seller authorises a brokerage to market the property.

docs.label: Form B — Buyer Representation
docs.note: Buyer authorises a brokerage to represent them.

docs.label: Form F — MOU / Sale Contract
docs.note: Binding sale agreement; deposit typically 10% on signing.

docs.label: Form I — Cooperation Agreement
docs.note: Between brokerages when buyer and seller use different firms.

docs.label: Manager's Cheques
docs.note: Cleared funds prepared for transfer day.

docs.label: Developer NOC
docs.note: Cleared in advance of the transfer appointment.

docs.label: DLD Transfer Appointment
docs.note: Title is transferred at the Dubai Land Department (or relevant emirate).

docs.label: New Title Deed Issuance
docs.note: Issued in the buyer's name on the day of transfer.

paperwork.ctaBody: Each transaction has its own paperwork map. Tell us where you are in the journey and we'll send the exact sequence that applies to your asset.
